MOTION Notice Of Hearing Re; Petition For Writ Of Mandate Of Administrative Mandate;
Off Calendar Dec-06-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PAUL R. CAVALLERO, dba "GREEN LIGHT MOTORS" Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate In The Superior Court:
APPEAR: Russell A. Robinson, Esq. 255-0462 for petitioner & moving party; Mary S. Cain-Simon, Deputy Atty General 510/622-2119 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: The Court ruled as follows: Grant, respondent to advise office of administrative hearings that Court wants hearing date set no later than 02/14/03 (currently set for 03/12/03). Any objections, counsel to be advised why cannot be set earlier. (302/AJR/PB) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
